is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person cannot prove Belgian nationality and is therefore a foreigner.

has_belgian_nationality.name: has_belgian_nationality
has_belgian_nationality.description: The person has Belgian nationality, as directly stated or proven in the case.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country (not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law).

is_eu_citizen.name: is_eu_citizen
is_eu_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

covered_by_eu_free_movement_law.name: covered_by_eu_free_movement_law
covered_by_eu_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

in_illegal_residence.name: in_illegal_residence
in_illegal_residence.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for access or residence.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for access to or residence on the territory. Intermediate condition used to derive illegal residence status.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsibility_determination_.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsibility_determination_.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a current and real risk that the person will abscond, established after individual examination based on objective criteria.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person's situation has been performed.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognized_by_national_authority_of_orig.name: recognized_by_national_authority_of_origin
recognized_by_national_authority_of_orig.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner under the statutory definition.

no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
no_residence_application_filed_after_ill.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.name: used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure
used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal of foreigners.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_m.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_m.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

filed_new_application_immediately_after_.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
filed_new_application_immediately_after_.description: The person filed a new residence application or new international protection request immediately after being subject to a refusal of entry or residence, a decision ending their stay, or a pushback or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: When questioned on the matter, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the state responsible for an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes_in_member_states
multiple_applications_with_negative_outc.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_other_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned on the matter, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU regulations on determining the responsible state.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.description: The person declared or their file shows that they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal.description: The person is subject to a fine because they filed a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_criterion_met.name: absconding_criterion_met
absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the statutory objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
